title: Gary Crockett advances to Democratic primary runoff election for U.S. Senate in Louisiana
full_text:
Gary Crockett advances to Democratic primary runoff election for U.S. Senate in Louisiana
Gary Crockett advances to Democratic primary runoff election for U.S. Senate in Louisiana
ByThe Associated Press
May 20, 2026, 4:59 PM
WASHINGTON -- Gary Crockett advances to Democratic primary runoff election for U.S. Senate in Louisiana.
